form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at Caulfield Heath 3yo F Bm64 November 12 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Blaze Away carrying 59kg at $12. When resuming last campaign third of 9 at Sale Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1112m, 3.5 len behind Bajaria carrying 57kg at $3.40. Resumes after a recent trial win. Has plenty of ability and capable of a bold return.
